message:
feat(gateway): add mail events service for WebSocket publishing

Add MailEventsService that publishes real-time WebSocket events for
Agent Mail and file reservation changes. This enables reactive UI
updates when agents communicate or claim file reservations.

Event types published:
- mail.received -> user:mail:{userId} channel
  Notifies users when they receive new agent messages

- reservation.acquired -> workspace:reservations:{workspaceId} channel
  Broadcasts when an agent acquires file pattern reservations

- reservation.released -> workspace:reservations:{workspaceId} channel
  Broadcasts when reservations are released

- conflict.detected -> workspace:conflicts:{workspaceId} channel
  Alerts when overlapping file reservations create conflicts

- conflict.resolved -> workspace:conflicts:{workspaceId} channel
  Notifies when conflicts are resolved (expired, released, overridden)

Payload interfaces provide type-safe event data including:
- Message metadata (from, to, subject, priority, threadId)
- Reservation details (patterns, exclusive flag, expiration)
- Conflict information (existing reservation, requesting agent)

This integrates with the existing WebSocket hub infrastructure
(channels.ts, messages.ts, hub.ts) which already defines the
channel types and message type enums.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
